ClearCommand
 
Client
Main client class
CollectionManager
class that manages collection of movies
Command
parent class for all commands
CommandManager
helping class for history command stores all commands used on client
CommandResponse
class used to send objects from server
Coordinates
Coordinates base class
CoordinatesComparator
helping class to compare movies by their coordinates
CountLessThanScreenwriterCommand
 
Country
 
ElementInputManager
class used to get movie and person objects from user
ExecuteScriptCommand
used to execute scripts on client
ExitCommand
used to close client
FindIdCommand
helping class used for update id command
HelpCommand
used to get list of all commands
HistoryCommand
used to get last 10 commands
InfoCommand
used to get info about collection

Adapter for LocalDateTime Class
Movie
 
MpaaRating
 
OutputManager
class that turns values from server to string
Person
 
PrintFieldAscendingMpaaRatingCommand
used to get all mpaa rating in ascending order

used to remove first element by its usaboxoffice
RemoveByIdCommand
used to remove movie by its id
Response
 
Runner
class that runs client on some channel
Server
main server class
ShowCommand
used to print all collection items sorts them by their distance from (0,0)
UpdateIdCommand
used to replace item with given id
Validator
class that validates all values separately
ZonedDateTimeAdapter
Adapter for ZonedDateTime class
